propositions: Add a required-environment op-cert verification lane that mirrors the identity merge-gate, reusing the merged-log walk and config-driven posture/boundary rather than a parallel walker.

The verify-opcert CLI reads verify.require_environment and verify.opcert_enforce_since from config, groups merged-log events by ticket_id, and verifies each in-scope ticket's completion-verifier op-cert.
Exit 1 iff an enforced in-scope ticket lacks a valid required-environment op-cert; otherwise exit 0 as advisory.
The enforcement anchor for a ticket lacking an op-cert is the introducing commit of its terminal close STATUS event, tested against the grandfather boundary.
The workflow gains a bare 'run: rebar verify-opcert' step in the same job plus a CI-trigger audit comment classifying each on: trigger.
The story is blocked on keystone e4df op-cert storage/producer primitive, which requires a reducer change to store DSSE op-cert envelopes on tickets.
